case_title: CLAUDIA JAQUELINE TORRES VS. JOSE ESCOLERO BONILLA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-17-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY TORRES, CLAUDIA JAQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, JOSE ESCOLERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUL-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, JOSE ESCOLERO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
